name: YDx Innovation Corp.
summary: YDx Innovation Corp., a technology company that develops augmented and virtual reality, esports events, and interactive exhibitions technologies in Canada and Brazil. Its Arkave VR Arena division operates a gaming platform for virtual reality experience to location based venues. The company's YDreams Global division develops interactive experiences for conceptual spaces and exhibitions. Its offers Game On Festival, a format of esports events that combines digital storytelling and competitive gaming. The company was formerly known as YDreams Global Interactive Technologies Inc. and changed its name to YDx Innovation Corp. in January 2019. YDx Innovation Corp. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
